For the character from Dota 2 lore, see Midas (character).

The Hand of Midas is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Accessories.

Hand of Midas
Preserved through unknown magical means, the Hand of Midas is a weapon of greed, sacrificing animals to line the owner's pockets.
Accessories
Cost 2200 (1750)
Sell Value 1100
Active Transmute
Bonus ? +35 Attack Speed
Shareable 0
Disassemble 0
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe

Additional Information

[edit]
  • View the Transmute Efficiency table for Transmute gold acquired based on the target it is used on.

Ability

[edit]

Transmute

[edit]
Transmute
▶️
Ability
Unit
Affects
Enemy Units
Damage
Instant Kill
Instantly kills the target non-hero unit, transmuting it into gold. Sets the target's gold bounty to a fixed value, while granting the target's default experience value without sharing it with others nearby.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range:  600
Set Gold Bounty: 160
If cast on a neutral creep, also grants a few Madstone to the caster, and one to random allies.
Caster Madstone Acquired: 2
Caster Madstone Acquired (Turbo Mode): 3
Number of Random Allies: 1
Number of Random Allies (Turbo Mode): 2
Cannot be cast on Roshan, Creep-Heroes, Ancient Creeps, and Necronomicon Warriors.
A newly acquired Hand of Midas starts with 1 charge.
Initial Charges: 1
90
2
0
Details
  • Upon cast, Transmute instantly kills the target unit, dealing
    EXPR
    100% × CurrentHP damage to kill the targeted creep, triggering most on-damage events.
    • This damage fully ignores any form of damage manipulation.
  • Grants the caster 160 unreliable gold and
    EXPR
    1 × XPBounty.
    • The target's default bounties are not granted. This means that no hero nearby gains the default gold and experience from death.
    • Despite the visual effects, the gold and experience are granted instantly.
    • If targeting a Flagbearer Creep, the aura gold bounty is still granted.

Recommended Heroes

[edit]

These heroes have abilities that synergize and allow them to make good use of Transmute.

Carry heroes who need to farm for late-game items and benefit from the experience and attack speed for farming and/or fighting often buy an early Hand of Midas.

Some support heroes who are not very item dependent may choose to build Hand of Midas in order to accumulate gold for bigger late-game items and gain levels at a faster pace.

Tips

[edit]
  • Transmute fully replaces the targeted unit's gold bounty, so that the target's default gold bounty is not granted.
    • Because of this, Transmute should always be cast on targets with a low gold bounty.
  • The experience bounty of the target is entirely granted to the caster, it is not shared with allies within the area.
  • The earlier Hand of Midas is purchased, the earlier it will pay itself off during the match and result in an effective net worth gain.
    • Assuming it is always used whenever a charge is ready, Hand of Midas increases GPM by 106.67 .
      • It takes 19 minutes and 30 seconds to pay its 2200 cost off, which is 14 casts.
      • It takes 15 minutes and 00 seconds to pay its 1750 recipe cost off, which is 11 casts.

Gallery

[edit]
  • Using Hand of Midas
  • Icon when Flockheart's Gamble is equipped
  • Item icon progress

Trivia

[edit]
  • Midas is based on Midas, a figure from Greek mythology who turned all he touched to gold.
  • Alchemist's cosmetic item, Midas Knuckles, is based on Hand of Midas.
  • In Deadlock, the Cultist Sacrifice item may be inspired by Hand of Midas, both instantly killing a targeted non-player unit to gain wealth.

Recent Changes

[edit]
Main Article: Hand of Midas/Changelogs
Version
Description
7.41
(2026-03-24)
  • Transmute
    • No longer prevents camp-clearing Madstone bundles from spawning if it was used on the last creep in neutral camp
    • Getting guaranteed Madstone bundle from Transmute used to prevent the camp-clearing bundle from spawning
7.40
(2025-12-15)
  • Transmute
    • No longer multiplies the target's experience bounty by 2.1. [?]
    • Reduced charge replenish time from 110 to 90.
7.38
(2025-02-19)
  • Transmute
    • no longer secures a neutral item token from the current tier.
    • No also grants a full Madstone bundle when cast on a neutral creep.
    • A Madstone bundle contains 2 Madstones for the caster, and one for a random ally. [?]
